name: libgirepository-2.0-0
title: libgirepository-2.0-0
summary: GLib runtime library for handling GObject introspection data
description:
GLib runtime library for handling GObject introspection data
GLib is a library containing many useful C routines for things such
as trees, hashes, lists, and strings.  It is a useful general-purpose
C library used by projects such as GTK+, GIMP, and GNOME.
.
This package contains the shared library used by language bindings such
as PyGObject and gjs to call GObject methods.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libgirepository-2.0-0 because GLib runtime library for handling GObject introspection data.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libgirepository-2.0-0 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libgirepository-2.0-0 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libgirepository-2.0-0 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
